scripts.dev:shell:mfe: concurrently -k -n promo,shell -c magenta,cyan "npm run remote:promo" "npm run dev -w @bank-poc/mobile-shell"
scripts.dev:mfe: concurrently -k -n spend,portfolio,wealth,ai -c magenta,yellow,blue,cyan "npm run remote" "npm run remote:portfolio" "npm run remote:wealth" "npm run dev -w @bank-poc/ai-shell"
scripts.dev:real: concurrently -k -n server,spend,portfolio,wealth,ai -c green,magenta,yellow,blue,cyan "npm run server -w @bank-poc/server" "npm run remote" "npm run remote:portfolio" "npm run remote:wealth" "npm run dev -w @bank-poc/ai-shell -- --mode real"
